rationale: Educ. Code §29.061 governs certification of bilingual education and ESL teachers. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The State Board for Educator Certification shall provide for the issuance of teaching certificates appropriate for bilingual education instruction to teachers who possess a speaking, reading, and writing ability in a language other than English in which bilingual education programs are offered and who meet the general requirements of Chapter 21.
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption increase and bilingual education teacher certification provisions.
